message:
test(runtime_compat,ui_query): add 11+8 tests for compat runtime and UI query helpers

runtime_compat.rs (0→11): RuntimeBuilder current_thread/multi_thread/worker_threads/build,
CompatRuntime block_on/spawn_detached, sleep, timeout success/expiry, multi-thread block_on.

ui_query.rs (3→11): RulesetProfileState default fields, PaneBookmarkView::from with/without
tags, SavedSearchView::from minimal, profile tie-breaking lexicographic, no-applied stays
default, bookmark view JSON serialization.

wa-1u90p.7.1 Batch 15

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
